Shopping Scams

Guides covering fake online retailers, counterfeit goods, pet scams, and marketplace shopping fraud.

Shopping Scams

How to Spot and Avoid Amazon Scam Emails in the UK

Amazon scam emails are increasingly common in the UK, with fraudsters impersonating the retailer to steal login credentials and payment information. This guide explains what these scams look like, how to spot the red flags, and what steps you should take if you receive a suspicious email claiming to be from Amazon.

Updated 2026-04-17

Shopping Scams

Puppy Sale Scam Checklist: Warning Signs Before You Pay a Deposit

How to assess suspicious puppy adverts, breeder claims, shipping stories, and deposit requests.

Shopping Scams

Ticket Resale Scam Checklist: Concert and Event Warning Signs Before You Pay

How to review ticket resale offers on social media, messaging apps, and listing platforms.
